prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-TRAVELGLDPNGKIT-14PC-RUBBER Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Lightweight Backpack Gold Panning Kit with Mini Rubber Sluice Box, 14pc Description: Gold panning and recovery equipment prospectors kit designed to be lightweight and easily carried into your claim site to evaluate your gold prospect before taking in bigger equipment. This 14pc compact, portable and travel friendly gold prospecting kit has it all, allowing you to focus on panning and recovery, while we take care of the rest.

Before we dive into the kit features, let’s look at the fine print! This kit includes: 10" riffled gold pan and 12" dual riffle pan, one sand scoop, a 8lb black sand pick-up tool, magnifying tweezers, fine gold recovery tools, pocket mini gold sluice box, and a 30 holes/inch mini sifter classifier and black drawstring backpack.

The highlight of this kit is without a doubt the mini sluice box. Measuring 12 inches, the mini rubber sluice box for gold recovery from ASR Outdoor ready to use out of the box with no assembly required, is constructed from durable and weatherproof TPR rubber that will not crack in cold weather and contains 3 tried and true riffle patterns to extract fine gold recovery. This kit is easy to carry and extremely portable as it comes with the included black drawstring backpack. The drawstring backpack houses all the included gold mining equipment, keeping everything organized and convenient to tote to and from the field site.

Lightweight, compact and travel-friendly, this ASR Outdoor 14 piece portable gold panning kit has you covered from start to finish on the gold prospecting front; setting you up for success in the field whether you’re panning, cleaning, sorting, examining or storing.

Good luck and happy gold prospecting on your mining claim, we hope you strike it rich! Search Terms: adult gold panning kit prospecting equipment tools camping hobby recreation fine recovery slucebox classifier screen set sifter sieve gift for dad beginner goldpan summer adventure gravity trap travel portable backpack sluic Features: - COMPACT SLUICE GOLD PANNING KIT: Included gold recovery tools; ASR Outdoor dual riffle pans, heavy duty sand scoop and mini sluice box, cleaning and storage equipment, and magnifying tweezers, this gold panning kit has all the equipment needed for a successful day of gold panning in the field - PORTABLE MINI SLUICE BOX: Measuring 12 inches, ready to use out of the box with no tools or assembly required; the mini sluice box is made from durable and weatherproof TPR rubber and contains (3) riffle patterns built in to aid in fine gold recovery - MULTIPURPOSE DRAWSTRING BACKPACK: This gold panning or gold prospecting kit conveniently houses all the included gold mining equipment in a multipurpose black drawstring backpack, making this kit easily portable, organized and convenient to tote to and from your field site - GOLD CLEANING AND STORAGE TOOLS: In addition to the recovery equipment included in this kit, you also have a great assortment of useful tools to help you clean and store gold, gems or other found minerals; for examination, the magnifying tweezers - GOLD PANNING KIT INCLUDES: This compact, lightweight, portable gold prospecting kit includes 10 inch and 12 inch dual riffle pans, brass probe scoop, black sand magnet tool, tweezers, mini sluice box, a 30 holes/inch sifter and drawstring backpack === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
